---
title: "Past Works"
---

A selection of past analyses and research work.

- **[2011 Listeria Outbreak](Listeria_2011.html)** *(2026-05-23)* — GMITS
  applied to a sporadic foodborne outbreak, comparing forecast accuracy
  across input sizes (n = 4/5/6) and testing sensitivity to
  right-truncated (underreported) recent data.

- **[HFRS Incubation Period Estimation](Hantavirus.html)** *(2026-05-14)*
  — Bayesian (Stan/HMC) and MLE estimation of the incubation period for
  hemorrhagic fever with renal syndrome, using a doubly interval-censored
  likelihood.

- **[Bongkrekic Acid Food Poisoning (2024)](Bongkrekic_Acid_2024.html)**
  *(2026-05-14)* — Early-stage outbreak forecasting with GMITS (Grey
  Model for Irregular Time Series), validated on synthetic data and
  applied to a real point-source outbreak. This is the main intention
  behind researching limited-data prediction.

- **[Bongkrekic Acid Outbreak — Conference Poster](Bongkrek_Poster.html)**
  *(2024-10-25)* — Summary of the poster presented at the 35th Annual
  Meeting of the Japan Epidemiological Society, covering attack rates
  and case-fatality ratio for the same 2024 outbreak.

- **[Internship at TWCR](Internship.html)** *(2024-08-30)* — Data
  visualization work from an internship at the Taiwan Cancer Registry,
  including a county-by-cancer-site incidence ranking heatmap.

- **[Evaluating a New Pandemic Influenza Outbreak in Kyoto](Summer-camp.html)**
  *(2024-08-10)* — Group simulation exercise from the Summer Bootcamp of
  Infectious Disease Modeling (Kyoto, 2024): an age-structured
  compartmental model comparing school closure, masking, and
  vaccination for a hypothetical new pandemic influenza reaching Kyoto.
